payload.answer: Grounded: the identity claim for a person named Sam and the alias claim "Sam from Goldman" are supported by the provided evidence.

entity_resolution.reason: Evidence contains both an entity row for the person and an alias row supporting the alias claim; no specific entity ID was provided.

details: Accepted medium-confidence identity metadata for Sam as a Person.

raw_text: {"intent":"evaluate_groundedness","decision":"grounded","memory_cards":[{"kind":"identity","statement":"A person is identified as Sam.","confidence":"medium","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"Person","role":"subject"}],"relationships":[]},{"kind":"alias","statement":"Sam has alias \"Sam from Goldman\".","confidence":"medium","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"Person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Sam from Goldman","type":"Alias","role":"alias"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"has_alias","object":"Sam from Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"link","entity_id":null,"reason":"Evidence contains both an entity row for the person and an alias row supporting the alias claim; no specific entity ID was provided."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Grounded: the identity claim for a person named Sam and the alias claim \"Sam from Goldman\" are supported by the provided evidence.","citations":["entity row","alias row"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Accepted medium-confidence identity metadata for Sam as a Person.","Accepted medium-confidence alias metadata linking Sam to \"Sam from Goldman\"."]}}
